versions.title: Seedance Model Versions Compared
versions.description: Compare all Seedance AI video model versions — from the latest Seedance 2.0 with multimodal control to the budget-friendly Seedance 1.0.

items.title: Seedance 2.0 — Latest
items.description: ByteDance's flagship AI video model. Supports multimodal input (text, image, video, audio), multi-shot storytelling, native audio with lip sync, reference-driven generation, and 4–15s flexible duration. Ideal for cinematic and professional AI video production.

items.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro
items.description: Enhanced text-to-video and image-to-video generation with improved motion consistency and visual quality. A great balance of speed and output quality for professional workflows.

items.title: Seedance 1.0 (Pro & Lite)
items.description: The original Seedance model with Pro and Lite variants. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video with fast processing and reliable output quality at an affordable price point.

comparison.title: Seedance 2.0 Version Comparison
comparison.description: Compare all Seedance 2.0 model versions side by side — features, resolution, pricing, and capabilities.

capabilities.title: Seedance AI Video Generation Capabilities
capabilities.description: Seedance models support a comprehensive range of AI video generation features for creative professionals and developers.

items.title: Text to Video Generation
items.description: Generate high-quality AI videos from text prompts. Seedance understands complex descriptions and produces cinematic output with natural motion.

items.title: Image to Video Animation
items.description: Animate static images into dynamic AI videos. Upload any photo and Seedance brings it to life with realistic motion and camera movement.

items.title: Lip Sync & Native Audio
items.description: Seedance 2.0 supports native lip sync generation with tight audio-visual synchronization. Generate realistic dialogue and music-synced videos.

items.title: Multi-Shot Storytelling
items.description: Create cohesive narrative AI videos with multiple shots while maintaining character and scene consistency across complex sequences.

items.title: Reference-Driven Generation
items.description: Use reference images and videos to control visual style, character appearance, and motion in your Seedance AI video output.

items.title: Flexible Duration Control
items.description: Seedance 2.0 supports 4–15 second flexible duration, enabling both quick social media clips and longer narrative sequences.

items.title: Music Video Generation

faq.title: Seedance AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Seedance AI video generation models.

items.question: What is Seedance by ByteDance?
items.answer: Seedance is ByteDance Dreamina's AI video generation model family. It supports text-to-video, image-to-video, lip sync, multi-shot storytelling, and native audio generation for professional AI video creation.

items.question: What is the difference between Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 1.5 Pro?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 introduces multimodal input (text, image, video, audio), multi-shot storytelling, native audio with lip sync, and flexible 4–15s duration. Seedance 1.5 Pro focuses on enhanced text/image-to-video with improved motion consistency.

items.question: What video resolution does Seedance support?
items.answer: Seedance models support 720p video output with 6 aspect ratio options: 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 1:1, and 21:9.

items.question: Can I use Seedance for free?
items.answer: Yes! You can try Seedance AI video generator free online with sign-up credits. No credit card required to start generating AI videos.

items.question: Does Seedance support audio generation?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 supports native audio generation with lip sync and beat matching. You can upload reference audio to guide the video's audio output.

items.question: What is the maximum video length with Seedance?
items.answer: Seedance 2.0 supports flexible duration from 4 to 15 seconds. Seedance 1.5 Pro and 1.0 typically generate 5–10 second videos.

cta.title: Start Generating AI Videos with Seedance Free
